LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RALPH DAYAN, RALPH DAYAN'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL ARBITRATION PER CCP 1281.2 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE ISSUE APPEARS TO DEPEND ON THE NATURE OF THE CLAIMS TO BE SET OUT IN A NEW COMPLAINT. THE NEW COMPLAINT MUST BE FILED NOT LATER THAN APRIL 21, 2023. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND SUBMIT IT TO THE COURT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TWIN RIVERS CAPITAL, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to file first amended complaint (FAC) is granted. The FAC is not "deemed filed"; plaintiff shall file it.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

Motion For An Order To Compel Arbitration Per Ccp 1281.2
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RALPH DAYAN, RALPH DAYAN Motion For An Order To Compel Arbitration Per CCP 1281.2

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS RALPH DAYAN, RALPH DAYAN'S Motion For An Order To Compel Arbitration Per Ccp 1281.2 is Denied without prejudice. The issue appears to depend on the nature of the claims to be set out in a new complaint. The new complaint must be filed not later than April 21, 2023.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and submit it to the court in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
